Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses And Production Of Documents, And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-26-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: CARI A. COHORN, ESQ., 415.398.0900, FOR PLAINTIFFS JONATHAN SAYRE AND AARON TUCKER.
DANIEL J. TURNER, ESQ., AND ANTHONY J. ZALLER, ESQ., 323.592.3505, FOR DEFENDANT SFS 39, INC.

RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PLAINTIFFS JONATHAN SAYRE & AARON TUCKER'S Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses And Production Of Documents, And For Sanctions IS GRANTED SUBJECT TO THE LIMITATIONS ON SCOPE AND DEFINITION SET FORTH IN THE LETTER DATED MARCH 15, 2013 BETWEEN MS. CALLAHAN AND MR. TURNER (EXHIBIT "N"). AS TO SFS 39 IT IS ORDERED AS FOLLOWS, UNLESS OTHERWISE PROVIDED, WITHIN 10 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER: (1) SFS 39 WILL SUPPLEMENT RESPONSES TO REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION, SET ONE, NOS. 1-9, 12, 13, 14, 17 & 27-30. SFS 39'S OBJECTIONS TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION NO 16, 18-20 ARE OVERRULED. FULL AND COMPLETE RESPONSES SHALL BE SERVED. ALL DOCUMENTS IDENTIFIED IN THESE RESPONSES WILL BE DELIVERED TO PLAINTIFFS WITHIN 30 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER.(2) SFS 39 WILL SUPPLEMENT ITS RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET ONE, NOS. 3.1,4.1,4.2,12.2,12.3,12.5,12.6,12.12.7,13.1,13.2,14.1,15.1 AND 17.1. SFS 39'S OBJECTION FOR TO NOS. 3.6,3.7,12.1 & 12.4 ARE OVERRULED AND FULL AND COMPLETE ANSWERS SHALL SERVED. (3) SFS 39 WILL SUPPLEMENT ITS RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES NOS. 1-8 AND 13-17. SFS 39'S OBJECTIONS TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES NOS. 9-12 ARE OVERRULED. FULL AND COMPLETE ANSWERS SHALL BE SERVED. AS TO INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANTS, UNLESS OTHERWISE PROVIDED, WITHIN 10 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER, IT IS ORDERED AS FOLLOWS:(1) INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANTS WILL SUPPLEMENT THEIR RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION, SET ON NOS. 1-9 AND 18-20. OBJECTIONS TO REQUESTS FOR PRODUCTION NOS.10-17 ARE OVERRULED. FULL AND COMPLETE RESPONSES SHALL BE SERVED. ALL DOCUMENTS IDENTIFIED IN THESE RESPONSES WILL BE DELIVERED TO PLAINTIFFS WITHIN 30 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER.(2) INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANTS, WILL DELIVER TO PLAINTIFFS FULL AND COMPLETE RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES NO. 2.11,4.1,4.2,12.2,12.3,12.5,12.6,12.7,13.1,13.2,14.1,15.1 & 17.1. INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANTS OBJECTIONS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES NOS 2.7,3.6,12.1 & 12.4 ARE OVERRULED. FULL AND COMPLETE RESPONSES SHALL BE SERVED.MONETARY SANCTIONS OF $ 5,000.00 WILL BE ASSESSED AGAINST SRS 39 AND INDIVIDUAL DEFENDANTS AND THEIR COUNSEL PAYABLE TO PLAINTIFFS AND THEIR COUNSEL WITHIN 10 DAYS FROM THE DATE OF THIS ORDER. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT PROPOSED ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM PAUL RENNE, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay
Off Calendar Apr-16-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: CARI. A. COHORN, ESQ., 415.398.0900, FOR PLAINTIFF JONATHAN SAYRE.
ANTHONY J. ZALLER, ESQ., 323.592.3505, FOR DEFENDANTS SFS 39, INC., JERRY BOZZO, ANDREA FRONCILLO AND DANTE SERAFINI.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANTs SFS 39, INC., JERRY BOZZO, ANDREA FRONCILLO, DANTE SERAFINI's Motion To Stay is denied. The arbitration and instant action involve different parties and different damages. The arbitration award will have no collateral estoppel effect on this case. A stay would delay this action and prejudice plaintiffs. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.
